sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 47.4g. omega3 is where the section starts to wobble. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 47.4g. omega3 is where the section starts to wobble. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 15.3g. fibre is where the section starts to wobble. for a seed, that is exactly what you want to see.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 15.3g. fibre is where the section starts to wobble. for a seed, that is exactly what you want to see.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 28.3g. the amino acid profile is carrying real weight. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 28.3g. the amino acid profile is carrying real weight. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 1% DV, vitamin b12 at 0% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 1% DV, vitamin b12 at 0% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 65% DV, zinc at 54% DV, iron at 38% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 65% DV, zinc at 54% DV, iron at 38% DV stand out most. that is useful, but still not a huge mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. unusually protein-forward for a seed snack because that gives it some practical appeal versus lighter snack foods. has clear crunchy snack appeal because easy to understand and package as a snack food. still brings some useful minerals because not devoid of nutritional upside despite the weaker category fit.

sections.subtitleText: pros first. unusually protein-forward for a seed snack because that gives it some practical appeal versus lighter snack foods. has clear crunchy snack appeal because easy to understand and package as a snack food. still brings some useful minerals because not devoid of nutritional upside despite the weaker category fit.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next. salt load is a major practical negative because the roasted salted format brings a clear real-world downside. weak fibre density for the seed category because seeds are supposed to dominate on fibre more convincingly than this. fat profile is rough for a seed-category food because too much saturated fat and not enough omega-3 support for this category.

closing.summary: Watermelon Seeds (Roasted & Salted) stands out for unusually protein-forward for a seed snack and has clear crunchy snack appeal. but it also gets held back by salt load is a major practical negative and weak fibre density for the seed category. Best only as a supporting add-on rather than something to lean on heavily.
closing.finalReveal: Watermelon Seeds (Roasted & Salted) is D tier.
